visual.name: boxplot
visual.description: A custom Box Plot visual for Power BI with vertical and horizontal layouts, category label formatting, sorting, and configurable axis styling.

strings.Visual_Description: A custom Box Plot visual for Power BI.
strings.Landing_Text: Add fields to build the box plot.
strings.Landing_Sampling_Value: one record or sample inside each category
strings.Landing_Values_Value: numeric measure used to compute the distribution
